summary: Completed comprehensive testing of audit log restore functionality. All 16 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing confirmed all features working correctly: historial page displays audit logs with proper color coding, ELIMINAR entries show 'Restaurable' badge, clicking entries opens detail modal with deleted data, restore button is present and functional.
passed_tests: Backend: Login with admin credentials works correctly
Backend: Delete operations save datos_completos in audit log (tested Marca, Hilo)
Backend: POST /api/historial/{log_id}/restaurar successfully restores deleted items
Backend: Restore creates RESTAURAR audit log entry
Backend: Restore rejects non-ELIMINAR logs (returns 400)
Backend: Restore returns 404 for non-existent log IDs
Backend: GET /api/audit-logs returns paginated list with filters
Backend: Filter by entidad works correctly
Backend: Filter by accion (including RESTAURAR) works correctly
Backend: GET /api/audit-logs/entities returns unique entity list
Backend: GET /api/audit-logs/stats returns action/entity statistics
Backend: Restore works for Tipo Producto
Backend: Restore works for Entalle
Frontend: Historial page loads with stats cards (Total, Creaciones, Ediciones, Eliminaciones)
Frontend: Audit logs display with color-coded action badges (CREAR=green, EDITAR=blue, ELIMINAR=red, RESTAURAR=amber)
Frontend: ELIMINAR entries show 'Restaurable' badge when datos_completos exists
Frontend: Entity filter dropdown present and functional
Frontend: Action filter dropdown includes RESTAURAR option
Frontend: Clicking on log entry opens detail modal
Frontend: Detail modal shows 'Detalle de eliminar' title
Frontend: Modal displays 'Datos del elemento eliminado' section with field values
Frontend: Modal shows restore warning text
Frontend: 'Restaurar elemento' button present with data-testid='restore-button'
seed_data_creation: Created test data during backend tests: TEST_MARCA_DELETE, TEST_MARCA_RESTORE, TEST_HILO_DELETE, TEST_TELA_RESTORE, TEST_TIPO_RESTORE, TEST_ENTALLE_RESTORE (all cleaned up after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Restore functionality tested end-to-end. Backend API tests in /app/backend/tests/test_restore_functionality.py cover: delete saves datos_completos, restore endpoint works, validation errors handled, RESTAURAR action logged. Frontend historial page at /historial shows all features working: color-coded logs, Restaurable badges, detail modal with deleted data, restore button. The amber color for RESTAURAR action is implemented correctly.

features_verified.delete_saves_datos_completos: Confirmed for Marca, Hilo, Tipo Producto, Entalle entities
features_verified.restore_validation: Rejects non-ELIMINAR logs, returns 404 for missing logs
features_verified.restaurar_audit_log: RESTAURAR action created in audit log after restore
features_verified.historial_page: Shows all action types with proper styling
features_verified.restaurable_badge: Displayed on ELIMINAR entries with datos_completos
features_verified.detail_modal: Shows deleted entity data in readable format
